mapper.select: SELECT pc.*, u.username FROM product_comment pc LEFT JOIN `user` u ON pc.user_id = u.id WHERE pc.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY pc.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_comment (user_id, product_id, order_id, rating, content, pics, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{orderId}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{pics}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE product_comment SET append_content = #{appendContent}, append_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
